metadata.description: SteelWolf Empire — Claude plugins marketplace per workflow operations Empire ecosystem (Trading Alliance, IronX, TA-Academy, Empire Hub). Pattern Anthropic 2026 native con dual skills+commands+hooks. Compatible Claude Code CLI, Cowork desktop, Claude.ai web.

plugins.name: swe
plugins.description: SteelWolf Empire workflow plugin. Slash commands per apertura sessione (/swe:start), chiusura (/swe:end), compact mid-session (/swe:compact). Auto-discovery via skills + slash explicit invocation via commands + lifecycle hooks (SessionStart, SessionEnd, UserPromptSubmit forced-eval 84-100% activation). LL-Empire binding governance V1-V6, PROTOCOLLO GO non derogabile, dual-PC parity PREDATOR/ACE.

plugins.name: empire-research
plugins.description: Empire research enforcement — WebFetch + WebSearch verifica empirica live di schema/spec/feature esterno Anthropic PRIMA di proporre architettura. Anti-confabulation pattern LL-Empire-011 + LL-Empire-024. Trigger naturale o /empire-research:research [topic].
